title: The One Job AI Can't Replace, According to @3blue1brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel's YouTube interview with 3Blue1Brown discussing which job categories are resistant to AI replacement. The segment focuses on identifying roles where AI may have inherent limitations in capability or application.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Grant Sanderson of 3Blue1Brown about which job categories resist AI replacement. The conversation identifies roles where AI faces inherent limits in capability or application, framed around AI economics and workflow automation. The takeaway is a discussion of where automation stalls rather than a broad forecast of displacement.
